title: Use 'esc' to close  monday docs
excerpt: I like the monday docs very much to add notes and information to elements. But once you opened a monday doc it’s uncomfy to close it (using chrome browser). You have to click to the small X in the top right corner or to …

posts.author: V-Mann (Volkmar Fritz)
posts.cookedHtml: I like the monday docs very much to add notes and information to elements. But once you opened a monday doc it’s uncomfy to close it (using chrome browser). You have to click to the small X in the top right corner or to click in the very narrow space between doc frame and browser frame. It would be so fantastic to close the monday doc window with the ‘esc’-button. That’s all, and I think not that hard to implement
